description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a bear, featuring a soft, light brown exterior with a large white patch on its belly and a smaller white area on its snout. The bear has two rounded ears on top of its head, black button-like eyes, and a small black nose stitched onto the snout. Its arms and legs are short and rounded, with visible seam lines suggesting a hand-sewn construction. The back of the toy is plain light brown, with no additional markings or features. The surface appears to be made of a soft fabric, likely felt or fleece, and the toy is filled with a lightweight stuffing material. This bear is typical of those found in urban parks, playgrounds, or as a lost toy on sidewalks.
description: A soft, light brown stuffed bear with a white belly and snout, black button eyes, and rounded limbs. The toy has a plush, hand-sewn appearance and a gentle, neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, white belly, and outstretched arms with visible seam lines.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, rounded snout, and the thickness of its limbs.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain light brown surface and the shape of the head and body without facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the bear's profile and the curvature of its back and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with round black eyes and a small black nose stitched onto a white snout. There is no visible mouth, giving the bear a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The bear is sitting upright with its arms slightly outstretched and legs extended forward. The head is positioned straight above the body, giving a balanced and stable posture.
